summary: The weekly review pulse reveals mixed sentiments among users. While some appreciate the app's features and user experience, others express frustration with high transaction fees, poor customer support, and frequent UI changes. The main concerns are related to fees, charges, and transparency, as well as support and trust, which account for 25% and 25% of the themes respectively.

quotes: ["I will give 3 star because this app very first time give more cashback but now cashback rate is very low.", "Unreasonably high MTF charges compared to competitors.", "INDmoney offers useful features, but constant UI/UX changes make it frustrating to use."]
action_items: ["Review and optimize transaction fees to improve transparency and competitiveness", "Enhance customer support by providing timely and effective resolutions to user issues", "Implement a more stable and intuitive UI/UX design to improve user experience and reduce frustration"]

email_subject: Weekly INDMoney Voice of Customer Pulse
email_body: The weekly review pulse reveals mixed sentiments among users. While some appreciate the app's features and user experience, others express frustration with high transaction fees, poor customer support, and frequent UI changes. The main concerns are related to fees, charges, and transparency, as well as support and trust, which account for 25% and 25% of the themes respectively.
